---
title: "CU DataSoc"
---

Welcome to the Carleton University Data Science Society.

## Who are we?

We are data. Yes.

```{r}
source("images/plots/plots.R")
program_plot("2025/2026")
```

## Latest blog posts

::: {#latest-blog-posts}
:::

\`\`\`{=quarto} 31b8e172-b470-440e-83d8-e6b185028602::31b8e172-b470-440e-83d8-e6b185028602
